repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The James Cunningham photographs (1968-1973) contains photographs, contact sheets, and negatives taken by James Cunningham during his time as a student at Cornell University. Photographs include candids of students, Cornell Athletics games, campus events, and campus scenes.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: James Cunningham graduated from Cornell University in 1971.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: James Cunningham photographs, #37-5-4568. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also the October 2023 Cornellians article: "Decades Ago, Avid Photographer Captured Campus Life on Film."
